metadata.description: Agent skills library compatible with 18+ AI coding agents and the Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: apple-foundation-models
plugins.description: Build Apple Intelligence features with Foundation Models and Image Playground on iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS

plugins.name: codex-app-server
plugins.description: Build rich Codex integrations with the Codex App Server across Electron, Swift, Next.js, and other host apps

plugins.name: docxmakebetter
plugins.description: Create, edit, and analyze Word documents (.docx) with tracked changes, comments, formatting, and text extraction

plugins.name: jake-speak
plugins.description: Explain technical work to Jake in plain-English boxed cards, preserving outcomes and status while leaving out code mechanics

plugins.name: kain-personality
plugins.description: Invoke the Kain Jares / GenAIAlien personality for writing, product reactions, parody concepts, and image prompts

plugins.name: macos-dmg-builder
plugins.description: Build, sign, notarize, and package native macOS apps into distributable DMGs

plugins.name: nextjs-pwa
plugins.description: Build Progressive Web Apps with Next.js: service workers, offline support, caching, push notifications, and install prompts

plugins.name: nextstep-tours
plugins.description: Build product tours, onboarding flows, and interactive tutorials in Next.js with NextStep v2

plugins.name: onnx-webgpu-converter
plugins.description: Convert HuggingFace transformer models to ONNX format for browser inference with Transformers.js and WebGPU

plugins.name: plaud
plugins.description: Install and use Plaud's CLI and MCP surfaces for voice recordings, transcripts, summaries, and meeting workflows

plugins.name: sam3
plugins.description: Create and work with Meta SAM 3 for open-vocabulary image and video segmentation

plugins.name: shot-list
plugins.description: Generate professional shot lists from screenplays and scripts for production planning

plugins.name: skill-seekers
plugins.description: Convert documentation websites, GitHub repos, and PDFs into Claude AI skills

plugins.name: update-changelog
plugins.description: Automate changelog management, version bumping, release entries, prereleases, tags, and publish workflows

plugins.name: vercel-workflow
plugins.description: Build durable workflows with Vercel Workflow DevKit using 'use workflow' and 'use step' directives

plugins.name: worktree-bootstrap
plugins.description: Provision a freshly-created git worktree so its dev server runs like the main checkout: copies gitignored env files from the main checkout, installs node_modules with the repo's package manager (pnpm/npm/yarn/bun), and — for Next.js — checks the Turbopack workspace-root pin that prevents nested-worktree dev-server freezes. Works for any JS/TS repo.
